zh.Crookston, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾可盧可斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith於大約1270年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith26歲，母親Matilda Strathearn11268歲。他於大約1295年與Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1309年3月13日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Crookston, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾可盧可斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith于大约1270年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith26岁，母亲Matilda Strathearn11268岁。他于大约1295年与Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1309年3月13日在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith was born about 1270, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, was 26 and his mother, Matilda Strathearn, was 11268. He married Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith about 1295, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 March 1309, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith est né environ 1270, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda Strathearn, avait 11268 ans. Il a épousé Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith environ 1295, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1309, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith um 1270 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith 26 und seine Mutter Matilda Strathearn 11268. Er hat um 1295 in Scotland Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. März 1309 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Prisoner of English - Monmouthshire, Wal: Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith è nato il circa 1270 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Strathearn, aveva 11268 anni. Lui sposato Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith circa 1295, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 marzo 1309, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.Menteith, Perth, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteithが約1270年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteithは26歳，母Matilda Strathearnは11268歳であった。約1295年にスコットランドでMary Marjory Murdock, of Monteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1309年3月13日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Strathearn(은)는 11268세였다. 그는 대략 1295년 스컷랜드에서 Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 3월 13일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Strathearn, tinha 11268 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith aproximadamente 1295, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1309, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith родился около 1270 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Strathearn, 11268. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith около 1295 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 марта 1309 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Menteith 3rd Earl of Menteith nació aproximadamente 1270, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Menteith Mormaer of Menteith, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Matilda Strathearn, tenía 11268 años. Se casó con Mary Marjory Murdock, of Monteith aproximadamente 1295, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1309, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
